title: Teen who allegedly murdered Danvers woman found mentally incompetent to stand trial
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Crime The 18-year-old Lynn man has been committed to Bridgewater State Hospital and will be reevaluated in six months.
A Lynn teen accused of murdering a Danvers woman has been deemed mentally incompetent to stand trial.

David L Ryan/The Boston Globe By Darin Zullo April 22, 2026 | 7:36 PM 2 minutes to read A Lynn teen who allegedly murdered a woman in March has been found mentally incompetent to stand trial, court records show.

title: Red Sox’ Roman Anthony ruled out of lineup vs. Yankees due to sore back
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Red Sox “Let’s play it smart today, we’ll see where you’re at tomorrow.

title: Rat poison harms wildlife across the state. Major restrictions could be on the way.
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: Local News Rodenticides pose a serious threat to animals like bald eagles, owls, and foxes.
Lawmakers and advocates say that they are on the verge of a breakthrough on Beacon Hill.
After three owls were killed by rodenticide in Arlington in 2022, residents posted notices warning of the dangers of the poisons.

title: Fenway Park’s iconic ‘Red Seat’ is now a sofa — would you take it home?
author: Autumn Sloboda
bullets: Local News “Sectional 42” is on display at Fenway Park.

title: 17 charged in Randolph street takeover that occurred last fall
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Crime Authorities say participants swarmed police cruisers and set off fireworks during the street takeover.
The first-arriving Randolph police officer reportedly witnessed about 100 people in the street, with some setting off fireworks and others jumping on his cruiser.
